register.note: Full-width triptych (deg 1 stiff / deg 4 right / deg 12 overfit) is composed and thumbnail-legible; three flat line-plots in a frame keep it off 4 vs Ciechanowski's rendered object.

Like Seeing-Theory's residual squares, the hero renders the mechanism itself — the deg-12 curve contorting through every point and flinging off-frame IS variance, the stiff deg-1 line IS bias, and 0.23/0.03/0.72 trace the U on the page.
The see graphic self-explains via a degree header, axis ticks, a seen/unseen two-scores panel, and a sweet-spot-marked error-vs-complexity inset with legend.

Clears floor: the prior dead-air below the plot is gone (plot 420->360 so plot + two-scores + U-inset sit balanced in-viewport), smooth anti-aliased lines, hairline cards; short of 4 on left-column whitespace.
Clears floor: a live degree slider re-renders the fit across run/break/explain plus a story stepper and hero load-in — explanatory controls at parity with the cluster's standard.
Grammar held without dilution — blue=fit, gold filled/hollow=train/held-out, rose reserved for test-error, teal=active step, purple=control handle, prose terms underlined+weighted.

hero.note: Triptych on the same data with per-panel degree/test-error labels; tightened panels reduce whitespace. (A re-gate force-zeroed this from a stale brief fact; the hero is present per check:rubric and the prior gate's 3/4 read.)

assessment.note: The closing transfer-which-fix item is an open free-response prompt; the check mixes choice, predict, experiment-task, and transfer.

verdict.summary: Hero clears both floors (protagonist 3, mechanism 4); atmosphere and motion now clear floor 3 after the See dead-air fix — clears register 3 across the board.
